name: Mask Masters
overview: There were 12 statues symbolizing the 12 wisdoms to keep the world in peace.  However, the evil ‘Muspell’ corrupts the 12 statues into Takers and colors the world with the power of darkness.  Now the only hope for restoring peace is the Mask Masters, those chosen by the Mask to protect heaven's wisdom!

trailers.title: 마스크 마스터즈 오프닝송 '베스트프렌드' - MASK MASTERS Opening 'Best Friend'
